Video.summary: A woman whose fiancé tried to strangle her still believes he is a good guy; a teen who has lived a life of crime finds her younger sister following in her footsteps and wants to stop her.
Video.title: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Image.alt: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Video.summary: Matt accuses Ashely of cheating and physically checks her for signs of infidelity; Justin doubts that he is really the father of Shaitassia's child.
Video.title: DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant

Image.alt: DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant
DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant
DNA: You Let Her Assault Me While I Was Pregnant

Video.summary: Violet's baby was brutally beaten to death by a caretaker; David says his estranged wife's story did not add up after their daughter suffered severe injuries.
Video.title: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Image.alt: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Video.summary: Eric finally won custody of her daughter and suspects his ex Brittney of neglecting her! He suspects Brittney’s boyfriend Freddy of molesting her and knows that his daughter tested positive for meth! But what will the lie detector results reveal?
Video.title: This Child Was Living in Hell

Image.alt: This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell

Video.summary: Lainie and Justin have 9 month old baby together. Justin abuses Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. She’s come here to pass a lie-detector test to prove her fidelity. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?
Video.title: You Better Not Fail That Test!

Image.alt: You Better Not Fail That Test!
You Better Not Fail That Test!
You Better Not Fail That Test!

Video.summary: First, Daniel has almost a dozen children with ten different women. While he admits to being their father, he refuses to care and provide for most of them. Then, Tadrianna strips and has sex for money and her mother, Kim, can't convince her to stop.
Video.title: I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women

Image.alt: I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women
I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women
I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women

Video.summary: Josephine's family was ripped apart after her boyfriend Mark was accused of molestation. Her son, Anthony and his girlfriend, Renee believe Mark molested their 2 year old son. But Mark believes that Renee coached her son to say this!
Video.title: I Believe My Son!

Image.alt: I Believe My Son!
I Believe My Son!
I Believe My Son!

Video.summary: While out looking for work, Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was taken to the hospital where she died. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!
Video.title: A Tragic Accident

Image.alt: A Tragic Accident
A Tragic Accident
A Tragic Accident

Video.summary: A woman's partner will not marry her unless she can prove her child is his; Gaylon and Sarah return to the show to have another of her children tested.
Video.title: DNA: Make the Accusations Stop!

Image.alt: DNA: Make the Accusations Stop!
DNA: Make the Accusations Stop!
DNA: Make the Accusations Stop!

Video.summary: Katrina says she was molested by her step-father as a child. Katrina says that when she told her mother Phyllis, she not only forgave him, but stayed with himI And there's more... Katrina says after telling Phyllis, he continued to molest her!
Video.title: A Family Ripped Apart

Image.alt: A Family Ripped Apart
A Family Ripped Apart
A Family Ripped Apart

Video.summary: Jasmine’s 11 year old sister Lauren has had multiple sexual partners, stays out of the house for days on end and is headed on a downward spiral! Watch as Steve tries to help this troubled child and set her mother straight!
Video.title: Tragic Tale of Two Sisters

Image.alt: Tragic Tale of Two Sisters
Tragic Tale of Two Sisters
Tragic Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?
Video.title: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Image.alt: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl
22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl
22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Video.summary: Kelly's boyfriend says he has no idea how posts from him seeking sexual favors from other women got on various websites; Genesis thinks his wife cheats while he is at work.
Video.title: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Image.alt: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Video.summary: Marlon claims he caught Bernard molesting his own nephew two years ago! Bernard and his sister accuse Marlon of lying! Later, Tarone found out his sister’s boyfriend Donald molested their daughter. Donald says he mistook her for her aunt Felitha!
Video.title: An Unexpected Confession

Image.alt: An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession
An Unexpected Confession

Video.summary: Newlyweds Janiece and Shaquanna accuse each other of cheating with men; Robert says he recorded his girlfriend having sex with another man.
Video.title: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Image.alt: Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?
Is My Wife Really Done With Men?

Video.summary: Because of messages Dashana found on social media and her new boyfriend's phone, she suspects he is cheating; Richard says his girlfriend's family found her in bed with another man and forced her to tell him; Sean sets up cameras to spy on his wife.
Video.title: Shocking Cheating Confessions

Image.alt: Shocking Cheating Confessions
Shocking Cheating Confessions
Shocking Cheating Confessions

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Video.summary: Today on Steve Wilkos, Steven is desperate to find out who is the real father of his 3 year old son. He found out that his ex, Shannon, was intimate with 3 of his best friends when she got pregnant.
Video.title: Angry Dad Demands DNA

Image.alt: Angry Dad Demands DNA
Angry Dad Demands DNA
Angry Dad Demands DNA

Video.summary: Kimberly’s son was born with a rare disease and she suspected the child’s father of stealing money for his medical treatment. Then, Avonte was diagnosed with a rare form of cancer and never saw a dime from his aunt Terceira’s fundraiser for him!
Video.title: Who Stole From My Disabled Son?

Image.alt: Who Stole From My Disabled Son?
Who Stole From My Disabled Son?
Who Stole From My Disabled Son?

Video.summary: Latonya says her wife told her she was raped and became pregnant with triplets, but doctors later said she was never pregnant.
Video.title: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Image.alt: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Video.summary: Ashilaye says Romeo is always flirting with other women online and has photos of naked women on his phone; Tiffany thinks her husband had sex with her best friend.
Video.title: I Didn't See That Coming

Image.alt: I Didn't See That Coming
I Didn't See That Coming
I Didn't See That Coming

Video.summary: Melissa suspects that her long-distance boyfriend is not real, but is a false persona created by her best friend; a text message from a stranger informs Beverly that her husband is posting on numerous websites to cheat on her.
Video.title: Catfished!

Video.summary: Shanetta's boyfriend says she has been acting strangely, and he fears that their son may not be his; Tabitha's partner wants to know if the men with whom he caught her are really her family members.
Video.title: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Image.alt: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Video.summary: Gina separated from her husband Nate because she could never get along with his family. But Nate says that he's always had suspicions that their child wasn't really his. Then, Damond says that he doubts that he's the real father of Kendahl's child.
Video.title: DNA: It's Your Baby

Image.alt: DNA: It's Your Baby
DNA: It's Your Baby
DNA: It's Your Baby

Video.summary: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she’s the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?
Video.title: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Image.alt: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Video.summary: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.
Video.title: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Image.alt: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse
Young Mothers Accused of Abuse
Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Video.summary: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.
Video.title: Steve's Gang Intervention

Image.alt: Steve's Gang Intervention
Steve's Gang Intervention
Steve's Gang Intervention

Video.summary: Edith says that as soon as her daughter's new boyfriend moved in, her wallet was stolen and a $600 check was forged; Tuyet was floored when her friend accused her of stealing $30,000 worth of jewelry from her bag.
Video.title: Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?

Image.alt: Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?
Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?
Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?

Video.summary: A sisters nightmare ... 11-year-old Ana is terrified of older brother Ray who's regularly beat her since she was just five years old. Ana's fears have grown so much, she fears for her life every night when she goes to bed. While Ray is only 13, his on-stage behavior reveals his true colors, and shocks even Steve. With Ana's mother out of solutions, it's up to Steve and past guest Gary, to show Ray a better path in life and help Ana.
Video.title: My Big Brother Beats Me

Image.alt: My Big Brother Beats Me
My Big Brother Beats Me
My Big Brother Beats Me

Video.summary: Tamara's man quit his job, but, inexplicably, still has money coming in, and she thinks she knows why; Rainy says she caught her boyfriend responding to ads for sex with men and transsexuals.
Video.title: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Image.alt: Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money
Prove You're Not Having Sex for Money

Video.summary: Alex doesn’t think he’s the father of Halie’s baby girl because he suspects she’s unfaithful. Next, Kenchada has been on a revenge spree since Armando cheated on her 4 years ago. Can these relationships be saved?
Video.title: The Most Toxic Relationships Ever

Image.alt: The Most Toxic Relationships Ever
The Most Toxic Relationships Ever
The Most Toxic Relationships Ever

Video.summary: Ritchie received a video that appeared to be of his longtime girlfriend having sex with someone else; Jason's sister-in-law says he tried to seduce her.
Video.title: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Image.alt: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
